data.title: Author typography + color audit prompt + gaps register

data.body:
Review pass (cold context, agent:claude-opus-4-7-reviewer).

Checked:
- Plan acceptance criteria 1-5: all met.
- audit-prompt.md: 10 sections present, headings match plan spec for grep-ability.
- Type scale snapshot (sec 2) matches DESIGN.md lines 214-216 verbatim post-FRAC-17 (.text-title italic mixed-case, .text-subtitle upright weight 300 mixed-case, no text-transform: uppercase). Header note explicitly states this.
- Color tokens (sec 3): 19 surface + 12 house tokens reproduced verbatim against DESIGN.md lines 116-168. Hex values verified. Internal-id -> displayName mapping table included.
- Wordmark carve-out: JUSTIFY-WORDMARK action, exempt, untouched.
- Dead values documented: #6B4C9A (-> house-publications-{light,deep}, NEAR), raw #1a1a1a (-> foreground, EXACT), arbitrary text-[]/bg-[] values, and forbidden token names (house-publications-accent, lab-purple, charcoal-deep).
- Per-element formats (sec 4 + 5): all required fields present, match plan spec.
- Gap entry format (sec 7): file:line, description, nearest-fit, why-not-fit, proposed system change, page, date — all present.
- Decision rubric (sec 6): fully prescriptive. Tie-breaking rules cover MIGRATE-vs-GAP, MIGRATE-vs-JUSTIFY, GAP-vs-JUSTIFY, multi-axis gaps. No 'needs_human' / 'ask orchestrator' / 'flag for review' anywhere in audit flow.
- Output format spec (sec 10): unambiguous structure for <page-slug>-audit.md that FRAC-20 can consume without further questions.
- audit-gaps.md: header + HTML-commented format example + empty Gaps section. Append-only discipline stated.
- Implementer added good clarifications beyond plan: .display-roman escape-hatch handling, inherited h1-h6 global rule note, inversion check on color, image/motion non-goals.

Gates:
- pnpm typecheck: passes.
- pnpm test: 4 pre-existing failures on master (Neighborhood layout + ParticleSphere SSR + others) — unrelated to this docs-only branch. Confirmed by re-running on master HEAD with no local changes.

No findings. Moving to done.
